author: teamsuperpanda
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Convert Markdown notes into Anki flashcards and sync locally.

manifest.author: Team Super Panda
manifest.description: Convert Markdown notes into Anki flashcards and sync locally.
manifest.name: Panda Zap

name: Panda Zap

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- **Fix:** Deletion now only acts on source-tagged notes - removing the dangerous fallback that could delete cards from other notes sharing a deck (reported issue) - **Fix:** Reading-mode DOM processor now uses custom marker names (Q:/A:/I: were hardcoded) - **Fix:** Empty marker settings normalize to defaults instead of matching bare `:` - **Fix:** Note cache stores all duplicate Front values (was last-write-wins); prefers source-tagged entries - **Fix:** Image filenames are now unique per source file (`pandazap_hash_filename.ext` prevents collisions) - **Fix:** Markdown image paths with spaces and quoted titles parse correctly (was `split(' ')[0]`) - **Fix:** HTML normalization added for Anki field comparison (entities, `
`, `
`, whitespace) - **Fix:** Broad catch blocks now log to `console.warn` instead of swallowing silently - **Fix:** `DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS` wired into AnkiConnect request retry backoff - **Refactor:** Shared marker handling extracted to `src/sync/markers.ts`; media utilities to `src/sync/mediaUtils.ts` - **Tests:** 30 new tests across 3 new suites (markers, media utils, path-with-spaces, empty-marker fallback) - **Docs:** `docs/writing-cards.md` rewritten with more examples and clearer structure
releases.name: v1.0.6

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- **Fix:** Multiple notes targeting the same deck no longer delete each other's cards
- Each note is source-tagged so deletion detection is scoped per-file
- ESLint 10 upgrade
- Badge now tracks latest release dynamically
